title: Chinese President Xi Jinping secures historic third term as China's leader
description: Xi Jinping secured a historic third term as China's leader on Sunday, cementing his position as the nation's most powerful leader since Mao Zedong.
keywords: The Times of India: Latest News India, World & Business News, Cricket & Sports, Bollywood
